parts.title: Lower rack wheel (case-study sample)
parts.installSteps:
1) Open the dishwasher and slide out the lower rack.
2) Pry the old wheel off the rack axle with flat pliers.
3) Press the new wheel onto the axle until it clicks.

compatibilities.note: Sample row for case study: this model is treated as compatible with PS11752778 in our static catalog.

steps: Confirm the bail arm is down and the ice maker is switched on.
Check the water supply valve behind the fridge and the fill tube for ice blockage.
If still no ice, note any blinking pattern on the ice maker module (service manual) before replacing the ice maker assembly.
